title: More Nonsense Limerick 96
content:
There was an old person of Jodd,
    Whose ways were perplexing and odd;
    She purchased a whistle, 
    And sate on a thistle,
    And squeaked to the people of Jodd.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 96", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
